notes: Polish on v1.29.3: one forward-only progress bar across split sessions, roomier camera-back layout, and the app now identifies itself as RAW Keepers in Windows dialogs (SmartScreen, Task Manager, file properties).
notes_mac: Full-software audit release: 18 fixes. Blink detection now actually works (its AI model was never bundled), filename collisions no longer lose keepers, conversion results are counted honestly, cancel is honest everywhere, the free-disk guard works again, and Mac card-reader junk files are ignored.
